stories.headline: NBA Draft Rankings: Top 100 Prospects
stories.summary: The NBA draft is approaching, and teams are finalizing their big boards. Here's a look at the top 100 prospects, including Dybantsa and Peterson. The rankings have seen some big jumps, with some players rising into the top 25.

stories.headline: Jazz and Walker Kessler Stalled in Contract Talks
stories.summary: The Utah Jazz and restricted free agent Walker Kessler are at an impasse in contract negotiations. The Jazz have offered a five-year deal worth $140 million, but Kessler is seeking more. The two sides are still far apart, and it's unclear if they'll reach an agreement.

stories.headline: Trae Young to Decline Player Option, Become Free Agent
stories.summary: Atlanta Hawks star Trae Young will decline his $48.97 million player option and become a free agent. The Washington Wizards are the front-runners to sign Young, but other teams may also pursue him. Young's decision could have a significant impact on the NBA offseason.

stories.headline: D'Angelo Russell Picks Up Player Option with Wizards
stories.summary: D'Angelo Russell has opted in to his $5.97 million player option with the Washington Wizards. The move ensures Russell will return to the Wizards for the 2026-27 season. Russell's decision provides stability for the Wizards' backcourt.

stories.headline: World Cup 2026: USA Keeps Pressure On
stories.summary: The US men's national team is off to a strong start in the 2026 World Cup. The team has been applying pressure and creating scoring opportunities, but they still need to work on finishing. A win in their next match could help them advance to the knockout stage.

stories.headline: World Cup 2026 Power Rankings
stories.summary: The World Cup is underway, and teams are starting to separate themselves. The US is among the top contenders, but other teams like Brazil and Argentina are also looking strong. The power rankings will continue to shift as the tournament progresses.

stories.headline: Spurs Remain Committed to De'Aaron Fox
stories.summary: The San Antonio Spurs are committed to De'Aaron Fox as their starting point guard for the 2026-27 season. Despite Dylan Harper's emergence, the Spurs believe Fox is the right player to lead their team. Fox's contract and the team's financial situation will be important factors in their decision-making.

stories.headline: Wizards Considering Darryn Peterson with First Pick
stories.summary: The Washington Wizards are considering selecting Darryn Peterson with the first overall pick in the NBA draft. Peterson is a talented prospect who could help the Wizards rebuild. The team's decision will depend on various factors, including their scouting reports and draft strategy.

stories.headline: Timberwolves Interested in Josh Giddey
stories.summary: The Minnesota Timberwolves are interested in acquiring Josh Giddey from the Chicago Bulls. Giddey is a talented young player who could help the Timberwolves improve their backcourt. The team's pursuit of Giddey is part of their effort to upgrade their roster.

stories.headline: Pistons' Isaiah Stewart Available in Trade Talks
stories.summary: The Detroit Pistons have made Isaiah Stewart available in trade talks. The team is seeking shooting and playmaking, and Stewart's departure could help them address those needs. Several teams are interested in acquiring Stewart, who has two years left on his contract.
